name: Prince Choudhary
title: AI / ML Engineer
tagline: Building intelligent systems that connect data, language, and real-world impact.
bio: I'm an AI/ML Engineer focused on computer vision and real-time systems — from edge-optimized deep learning pipelines running on Jetson hardware to large-scale video analytics and RAG-based applications. Over the past few years I've shipped facial tracking, industrial defect detection, geospatial mapping, and automated surveillance systems that run reliably in production, not just in notebooks.
suggested_questions: What's his experience with computer vision?
Tell me about the facial tracking pipeline he built
How did he build this RAG-powered assistant?

experience.description: Engineered real-time computer vision and media streaming solutions, optimizing edge deployment pipelines for latency, cost, and throughput.
highlights: Built a facial tracking pipeline using YOLO and MediaPipe, introducing frame filtering and hybrid cloud routing that reduced AWS Rekognition API costs by 40%.
Quantized deep learning models to ONNX for Jetson Orin Nano deployment and resolved frame drops using multithreaded RTSP ingestion buffers.
Developed an enterprise video analytics streaming pipeline using FFmpeg and MediaMTX to ingest, re-encode, and broadcast TCP camera feeds.

experience.description: Designed and deployed deep learning models for industrial automation, geospatial mapping, and automated surveillance tracking systems.
highlights: Trained a high-speed YOLO scanner for conveyor belts, pairing it with adaptive thresholding and Gaussian image processing to boost detection accuracy by 16%.
Engineered a geospatial telemetry system that mapped satellite coordinate data to dual-camera synchronized panoramic video frames via timestamp alignment.
Created an automated trespass alert system using YOLOv8 with custom polygonal ROIs, integrating an adaptive frame skipping mechanism that reduced system load by 20%.

experience.description: Assisted with backend architectural design and database management for enterprise resource applications.
highlights: Developed secure, high-performance REST APIs for an HRMS platform utilizing Django REST Framework and SQL for optimized data persistence.

projects.name: AI Portfolio Assistant
projects.description: A RAG-powered chatbot that answers questions about my experience, skills, and projects using a custom retrieval + reranking pipeline with guardrails.

projects.name: Real-Time Facial Tracking & Hybrid Cloud Routing
projects.description: A YOLO + MediaPipe facial tracking pipeline with frame filtering and hybrid cloud routing that cut AWS Rekognition API costs by 40%, deployed on Jetson Orin Nano via ONNX quantization.

projects.name: Automated Trespass Alert System
projects.description: A YOLOv8-based surveillance system with custom polygonal ROIs and adaptive frame skipping, reducing system load by 20% while maintaining reliable intrusion detection.

projects.name: High-Speed Conveyor Belt Defect Scanner
projects.description: A high-speed YOLO scanner paired with adaptive thresholding and Gaussian image processing for industrial conveyor belts, improving detection accuracy by 16%.

projects.name: Geospatial Telemetry & Panoramic Video Mapping
projects.description: A system that maps satellite coordinate telemetry to dual-camera synchronized panoramic video frames via precise timestamp alignment.
